nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: American Ornithological Society
nodes.summary: American Ornithological Society是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联80种鸟类，包括黑頭鴨、绿翅雁、Chaco chachalaca等80种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 哥斯達黎加地理
nodes.summary: 哥斯達黎加地理是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括厚嘴拟啄木鸟、Black-and-white becard、Ochraceous wren等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 塔拉曼卡山脉
nodes.summary: 塔拉曼卡山脉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联16种鸟类，包括高地大蜂鸟、靛喉寶石蜂鳥、Costa Rican pygmy owl等16种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: Ochraceous wren
nodes.summary: Ochraceous wren（Ochraceous wren，学名 Troglodytes ochraceus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: According to the IOC, the nominate subspecies of ochraceous wren is found in the Costa Rica highlands from the Tilarán Mountains to the Talamanca ranges and in western and central Panama

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: According to the IOC, the nominate subspecies of ochraceous wren is found in the Costa Rica highlands from the Tilarán Mountains to the Talamanca ranges and in western and central Panama

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: festinus in eastern Panama; Cornell, Clements, and the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society (SACC/AOS) note its occurrence in adjacent northwestern Colombia as well. The ochraceous wren primarily inhabits wet epiphyte-laden montane forest, and also semi-open areas such as woodland edges, tall second growth, and pastures with trees

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: festinus in eastern Panama; Cornell, Clements, and the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society (SACC/AOS) note its occurrence in adjacent northwestern Colombia as well. The ochraceous wren primarily inhabits wet epiphyte-laden montane forest, and also semi-open areas such as woodland edges, tall second growth, and pastures with trees
